title: lysimachia nemorum
intro: Lysimachia nemorum, also known as wood betony, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and square stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of wood betony include reducing inflammation and relieving stress, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. In herbal preparations, wood betony is often made into a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety and digestive issues.
